issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional (You may trash). Current DSL lacks optional modifier.
SearchDeck filter incomplete: missing cost restriction (≤8), missing exclusion of Helmeppo, missing type filter for CHARACTER, missing destination specification (play from trash, not deck)

Missing end-of-turn effect: 'place the 1 Character played by this effect at the bottom of the owner's deck at the end of this turn' requires a separate OnEndOfTurn trigger or persistent duration mechanic
kind:'ByName' filters by card name, but effect requires type=SWORD and cost≤8; should use structured filter with type, cost, and exclude parameters

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Draw 1 card and play up to 1 {SWORD} type Character card with a cost of 8 or less other than [Helmeppo] from your trash. Then, place the 1 Character played by this effect at the bottom of the owner's deck at the end of this turn.
